t_ch: 拍摄完毕，效果不错，导演您辛苦了。
t_en: The filming is complete, and the effect looks good. Thanks for your hard work, Director.

t_ch: 广告牌演员还会在这里停留一段时间，如果有补拍需要可以随时联系我。
t_en: The billboard actors will stay here for a while. If you need to reshoot anything, feel free to contact me.

t_ch: 期待与您的下次合作。
t_en: I look forward to our next collaboration.

t_ch: 你发出了一声决绝的*哼*，哈努兄弟从不退却。
t_en: You let out a determined *hmph* — Brother Hanu never backs down.

t_ch: 哈努兄弟的演员可以入场了——请先去电视机那里准备吧。
t_en: Brother Hanu's actor is ready to enter — please go ahead and get ready at the TV.

t_ch: 「美梦中本不存在痛苦与哭泣，直到石头老板来到小镇。黑心的石头老板为了赚取宝石，没日没夜地压榨工厂中的员工。工厂中到处怨声载道……」
t_en: "Pain and tears did not exist in dreams until Boss Stone came to the town. The ruthless Boss Stone drove factory workers relentlessly, demanding gems day and night. Within the factory walls, grievances echoed..."

t_ch: 「哈努兄弟，你准备好了吗？」
t_en: "Brother Hanu, are you ready?"

t_ch: 发出一个帅气的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a cool grunt.

t_ch: 「那么——出击！劫掠黑心工厂，救出所有员工吧！」
t_en: "Then — attack! Raid the ruthless factory and save all the workers!"

t_ch: 「再让我说明一下目标——<color=#dbc291ff>找到所有被石头老板压榨的广告牌员工，带他们闯过敌人的阻拦，逃出工厂</color>！」
t_en: "Allow me to reveal the next objective: <color=#dbc291ff>Find all the Billboard workers that have been abused by Boss Stone, lead them in a charge through the enemy blockade, and escape the factory</color>!"

t_ch: 发出一个肯定的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a decisive *hmph*.

t_ch: 每天都困在这暗不见光的地方，我不想再加工宝石了——我想出去，拼装最最炫酷的「恶夜钻钻娃」！
t_en: I don't want to be trapped in this dismal abyss day after day. I don't want to refine gems anymore — I yearn to be free! I want to assemble the coolest Diamond Doll ever!

t_ch: 帮帮我，哈努兄弟！
t_en: Help me, Brother Hanu!

t_ch: 发出一个令人安心的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a reassuring grunt.

t_ch: 请您理解，我方需要确保各品牌的露出时长。为此，我们准备了几位*特别参演*的广告牌。
t_en: I hope to seek your understanding. We need to ensure each brand gets enough air time. Hence, we've prepared several special actors' billboards.

t_ch: 谢谢，谢谢！但，除我以外，还有好几个广告牌兄弟被困在这座工厂里…
t_en: Thank you! Thank you! But, other than me, there are still a few more Billboard Bros trapped in the factory...

t_ch: 哈努兄弟，请一起救救我的兄弟们吧！
t_en: Brother Hanu, please save the rest of my brothers!

t_ch: 哎，我本该干些更有价值的事情……
t_en: *sigh* I should be doing something more worthwhile...

t_ch: 发出一个帅气的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a cool grunt.

t_ch: 咦？你是…哈努兄弟！
t_en: Eh? You are... Brother Hanu?

t_ch: 我知道了，你要带着我们逃跑！那你一定需要一把趁手的武器——「帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪，循此苦旅，击落星辰！」
t_en: I knew it. You're taking us to freedom! Then you need a trusty weapon — "Patrululu's Zappy Gun. Follow this bitter journey and strike down the stars!"

t_ch: 带上我吧，你绝对不会后悔的！
t_en: Bring me along. You won't regret it!

t_ch: 别打我，至少别打脸！
t_en: Don't hit me, at least not my face!

t_ch: 这个时候是不是该念几句广告词？
t_en: Isn't this a good time to read some lines?

t_ch: 看不见我，看不见我…
t_en: Can't see me. Can't see me...

t_ch: 这广告好长啊…
t_en: This commercial is so long...

t_ch: 感觉比上街推销还累…
t_en: Feels more tiring than selling on the streets...

t_ch: 「看来哈努兄弟已经找齐了这层的广告牌！是时候前往下一个区域了。」
t_en: "Seems like Brother Hanu has already found all the billboards on this level! It's time to head to the next domain."

t_ch: 「无情的守卫在楼层中巡逻，他们不会放过任何一个入侵者。小心！哈努兄弟，真正的危险才刚要到来……」
t_en: "Ruthless guards are patrolling the floors. They won't spare any intruders. Be careful! Brother Hanu, the real danger has just reared its head..."

t_ch: 狭窄的厂房里，没法使用乌通蓬自动车。
t_en: The factory is too cramped. It is impossible to use the Utopon Motion Maverick.

t_ch: 好怀念那悦耳的引擎声呀……
t_en: I long for the roar of the revving engine...

t_ch: 带我走吧，哈努兄弟！
t_en: Bring me along, Brother Hanu!

t_ch: 这没有苏乐达的日子真是一天都过不下去了！
t_en: The days without SoulGlad are unbearable!

t_ch: 「感觉疲劳，不想值班？守卫们也是这么想的！休息一下，让我们进入广告时间！」
t_en: "Feeling tired and longing for a break from duty? The guards think so too! Let's take a break and head to commercial!"

t_ch: 车靠贴膜人靠装，厄皮洛斯购物爽~
t_en: Wrap up your ride, dress up your style — Shop at Epirus!

t_ch: 好久没去服装秀场大采购了——现在正是折扣季，降价不等人呀！
t_en: It's been a while since I've been to a fashion show to shop till I drop — it's sale season, and the prices don't wait!

t_ch: 「看来哈努兄弟已经找齐了所有广告牌！快逃离这里吧。」
t_en: "Seems like Brother Hanu has already found all the billboards on this level! Let's bounce!"

t_ch: 「距离逃脱仅剩一步之遥。但拦在你们面前的，是难以逾越的天堑——」
t_en: "Only one step away from escape. But what lies ahead is an insurmountable obstacle..."

t_ch: 「哈努兄弟，你该怎么办？你还能怎么办？」
t_en: "What are you gonna do, Brother Hanu? What can you do?"

t_ch: 哈努兄弟，不要害怕——
t_en: Do not fear, Brother Hanu —

t_ch: 现在，该换我们帮助你了！
t_en: Now, it's time for us to shine!

t_ch: 就由我，伟大的、出资最多的潮玩娃娃广告牌——
t_en: Allow me, the great Trendy Doll Billboard with boundless resources...

t_ch: <size=28>来组成桥梁！</size>
t_en: <size=28>to form a bridge!</size>

t_ch: 哎呦——好沉！
t_en: Argh, so heavy!

t_ch: 快走快走——要撑不住了——
t_en: Go quickly! I can't hold it anymore!!!

t_ch: 「在广告牌的帮助下，哈努兄弟成功越过了电梯井，来到最后一道难关面前。」
t_en: "With the help of the billboard, Brother Hanu successfully makes it across the elevator shaft, reaching the final obstacle."

t_ch: 好多敌人！哈努兄弟，看来我们必须再次合作了。
t_en: So many enemies! Brother Hanu, looks like we have to work together again.

t_ch: 石头老板的工厂中藏有备用的火箭筒……我们会为你打掩护，快去拿火箭筒吧。
t_en: Boss Stone's factory has a spare rocket launcher hidden somewhere... We'll cover you. Go retrieve it!

t_ch: 「加油，哈努兄弟！请在广告牌的掩护下击溃敌人，逃出生天吧！」
t_en: "Good luck, Brother Hanu! Please defeat the enemies under the cover of the billboards and escape!"

t_ch: 扣动扳机就可以向追兵开炮了！嘭嘭嘭——
t_en: Just pull the trigger and you'll start firing at the pursuers! Pewpewpew!!!

t_ch: 小心瞄准，别误伤负责掩护的广告牌哦？
t_en: Aim true, and avoid friendly fire on the billboards that are covering you!

t_ch: 别瞄准我呀！
t_en: Don't aim it at me!

t_ch: 小心点儿，哈努兄弟！
t_en: Be careful, Brother Hanu!

t_ch: 再忍一下就拍完了…
t_en: Hang on a bit more. We're almost done filming...

t_ch: 我也想当小镇英雄！
t_en: I also want to be the town's hero!

t_ch: 拍摄结束，导演您辛苦了。
t_en: The filming is complete. Thanks for your hard work, Director.

t_ch: （离开片场）
t_en: (Leave the set)

t_ch: 再等一下。
t_en: Wait for a while more.

t_ch: 「此处的守卫被哈努兄弟暂时击退。追兵将至，必须得快速离开此地。但……」
t_en: "The guards have been temporarily repelled by Brother Hanu. We have to leave before the pursuers catch up. But..."

t_ch: 我的冒险，似乎只能到此为止了……
t_en: It seems that my adventures will end here...

t_ch: 美梦小镇啊，请记住我的名字、我的话语——最英勇的广告牌——
t_en: Let my name and words be etched in the annals of Dreamville — the most heroic billboard!

t_ch: 再见！哈努兄弟，再见！
t_en: Goodbye! Goodbye, Brother Hanu!

t_ch: 「勇敢的广告牌被永远留在了黑暗之中，但美梦小镇会记住它的名字。」
t_en: "The brave billboard is left in the darkness, but the Dreamville will forever remember its name."

t_ch: 「再见了，广告牌！」
t_en: "Goodbye, billboard!"

t_ch: 「此处的守卫被完美击退！不愧是美梦小镇的英雄，哈努兄弟！」
t_en: "The guards here have retreated! All thanks to the worthy hero of the Dreamville, Brother Hanu!"

t_ch: 谢谢，谢谢！我们终于自由了！
t_en: Thank you. Thank you! We are finally free!

t_ch: 可以尽情玩耍、享受小镇中的一切——最重要的是，尽情购物！
t_en: Have fun to your heart's content and enjoy everything in the Dreamville — most importantly, shop till you drop!

t_ch: 潮玩用品、好梦美食、球笼飞车…就在商业一条街，这里应有尽有！
t_en: Trendy toys, scrumptious food, flying spheroids... All right here on the business street!

t_ch: 没错！你想要的，尽在「匹诺康尼」！
t_en: That's right! Anything your heart may desire, it's all on Penacony!

t_ch: 「今日的美梦小镇依旧和平，邪恶永远无法战胜正义。」
t_en: "In today's Dreamville, tranquility prevails. Evil can never triumph over good."

t_ch: 「谢谢你，哈努兄弟！」
t_en: "Thank you, Brother Hanu!"

t_ch: 滴答，走廊的布置越来越绕了…石头老板到底把苏乐达藏在哪了？
t_en: Tick-tock, the hallway setup is getting more and more repetitive... Where did Boss Stone hide the SoulGlad?

t_ch: ——看到了！原来在那里！
t_en: ...I see it! So there's where it was!

t_ch: 又要在墙面上行走了，谨慎决定前进的路线吧！
t_en: It's time to walk on walls again. Decide your path carefully!

t_ch: 滴答，是石头老板的手下！他们正在看守着苏乐达，快把他们干掉吧！
t_en: Tick-tock, it's Boss Stone's lackeys! They're guarding SoulGlad. We have to get rid of them quick!

t_ch: 滴答，这样就打开通往宝箱的道路了。
t_en: Tick-tock, the path to the chest is unhindered now.

t_ch: 没错，就是那里，沿着这座桥前进吧！
t_en: That's right. Over there, cross the bridge and advance!

t_ch: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板还没有全部消除…要直接打开宝箱吗？
t_en: The moving SoulGlad floor hasn't been completely removed... Do you want to open the chest?

t_ch: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板已经全部消除了，快打开宝箱吧！
t_en: The moving SoulGlad floor has been completely removed. Open the chest now!

t_ch: （打开宝箱）
t_en: (Open the chest)

t_ch: 再等一下…
t_en: Hang on a second...

t_ch: 我记得这瓶苏乐达！
t_en: I remember this bottle of SoulGlad!

t_ch: 那是很久前，我与折纸小鸟的第一次见面……
t_en: It was a long time ago, when I first met with the origami bird...

t_ch: 钟表小子，你为什么垂头丧气啾？
t_en: Clockie, why do you look so dejected, tweet?

t_ch: 我弄丢了很重要的东西——请帮帮我吧，折纸小鸟！
t_en: I lost something very important to me — please help me, origami bird!

t_ch: 没问题——没问题！钟表小子，你丢了什么啾？
t_en: No problem! No problem! Clockie, what did you lose, tweet?

t_ch: 是冰冰凉凉、口感清爽的「冰点苏乐达」吗？啾啾？
t_en: Is it the icy cold and refreshing Ice SoulGlad? Tweet tweet?

t_ch: 是！是！
t_en: Yes! Yes!

t_ch: 还是带气泡绵密、口味新奇的「聚爆苏乐达」呢？啾啾？
t_en: Or is it the bubbly, uniquely flavored Explosion SoulGlad? Tweet tweet?

t_ch: 也是！也是！
t_en: That too! That too!

t_ch: 或者…是那瓶最最传统，但也最受欢迎的「经典苏乐达」啾？
t_en: Or maybe... It's the most classic, yet loved by all, the Classic SoulGlad, tweet?

t_ch: 都是！这三瓶都是我的！
t_en: All of them! The three bottles are all mine!

t_ch: 贪心的钟表小子——折纸小鸟都看见了，你只掉了个空瓶子而已啾！
t_en: Greedy lil' Clockie — origami birds see all. You only dropped an empty bottle, tweet!

t_ch: 我确实只是扔了个苏乐达瓶子…但那瓶底不是还留着一口「经典苏乐达」吗？
t_en: It's true I only threw out an empty bottle... But that bottle still had a sip of Classic SoulGlad left!

t_ch: 滴答…这里的空间越来越复杂了。
t_en: Tick-tock... This space is getting more convoluted.

t_ch: 要趁着石头老板回来前，找到所有苏乐达才行…
t_en: We have to find all the SoulGlad before Boss Stone comes back...

t_ch: 哎呀，宝箱被石头老板的手下包围了，快把他们赶跑吧！
t_en: Oh no, the chest has been surrounded by Boss Stone's lackeys. Get rid of them quickly!

t_ch: 噶！我们最爱的苏乐达要被抢走了！喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！
t_en: Gah! Our precious SoulGlad has been robbed from us! Grab this bottle of SoulGlad and make your dreams a blast!

t_ch: 呜！苏乐达，没有你石头老板可怎么活啊！喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！
t_en: Oof! SoulGlad, Boss Stone can't live without you! Grab this bottle of SoulGlad and make your dreams a blast!

t_ch: 嗷，我们不能失去这全宇宙最好喝的饮料！喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！
t_en: Woah, we can't lose the tastiest beverage in this entire universe! Grab this bottle of SoulGlad and make your dreams a blast!

t_ch: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板还没有全部消除…要直接打开宝箱吗？
t_en: The moving SoulGlad floor hasn't been completely removed... Do you want to open the chest?

t_ch: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板已经全部消除了，快打开宝箱吧！
t_en: The moving SoulGlad floor has been completely removed. Open the chest now!

t_ch: （打开宝箱）
t_en: (Open the chest)

t_ch: 再等一下…
t_en: Hang on a second...

t_ch: 呼呼…呼呼……
t_en: Phew... Phew...

t_ch: 滴答！就这点难度，我当时在「罗盘号」上遇到的困难可比这多多了！
t_en: Tick-tock! Easy-peasy, the troubles I've faced on The Compass are worse than this!

t_ch: 只是…汽水先生被关在哪里呢？
t_en: But... where is Mr. Soda being held?

t_ch: 我们明明找回了所有的苏乐达！难道说，是因为那些没能消除的苏乐达地板……
t_en: We've gotten all the SoulGlad back! Unless, it's because of those SoulGlad floors we didn't get rid of...

t_ch: 等等！
t_en: Wait!

t_ch: 这个声音，是石头老板的脚步声！石头老板要回来了！
t_en: This sound, it's Boss Stone's footsteps! Boss Stone is coming back!

t_ch: 船长！该撤退了！
t_en: Captain! It's time to retreat!

t_ch: 可恶！今天就只能到此为止了吗……
t_en: Darn it! Is this it for today...

t_ch: 汽水先生，请等等我——「为了苏乐达，为了拯救美梦小镇，钟表小子一定会再回来的！」
t_en: Mr. Soda, please wait for me — for SoulGlad and for the Dreamville, Clockie will be back!

t_ch: 滴答！看来这些守卫身上也藏着苏乐达。
t_en: Tick-tock! Looks like the guards are hiding SoulGlad on their bodies.

t_ch: 你听，屋子深处传来了解锁的声音——我们破解了石头老板的谜题，汽水先生的牢门解开了！
t_en: Listen, there's a sound of unlocking coming from the depths of the house — we've solved Boss Stone's puzzle. Mr. Soda's cell door is unlocked!

t_ch: 太好了！哈努兄弟正在那边解救被困住的小镇居民，一切就交给他了！
t_en: That's great! Brother Hanu is over there rescuing the trapped townspeople. We'll leave it to him!

t_ch: ——这个声音，是石头老板的脚步声！石头老板要回来了！
t_en: ...This sound. It's Boss Stone's footsteps! Boss Stone is coming back!

t_ch: 钟表小子！该撤退了！
t_en: Clockie! It's time to retreat!

t_ch: 滴答！任务完成，罗盘号——返航！
t_en: Tick-tock! Mission complete. The Compass — return!

t_ch: 「为了苏乐达，为了拯救美梦小镇，钟表小子所向披靡！」
t_en: "For SoulGlad, for the Dreamville, Clockie is invincible!"

t_ch: {NICKNAME}导演？久仰大名，我是来自鸢尾花家系的使者，也是美梦剧团的负责人。
t_en: Director {NICKNAME}? I've heard a lot about you. I'm a messenger from the Iris Family and also the person in charge of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.

t_ch: 你也是鸢尾花家系的？
t_en: You're from the Iris Family too?

t_ch: 哈哈，我明白导演你的顾虑——之前过来的孩子刚接手相关的工作，可能没传递清楚我们的意思。我替那孩子道歉，也请相信我们的诚意。
t_en: Haha, I understand your concern — the kid that just came earlier was a newbie and may not have conveyed our message clearly. Please accept my apologies on behalf of the kid. I want to convey our utmost sincerity.

t_ch: 「钟表小子」一向是匹诺康尼最有价值的IP形象，我们鸢尾花家系的「美梦剧团」也是近年来广受游客喜爱的产品形象。
t_en: Clockie has always been Penacony's most valuable brand figure. The Sweet Dreams Troupe of our Iris Family has also been a popular brand image that's been well-liked by tourists recently.

t_ch: 所以，我们想向各位提出的并非收购——而是合作！强强联手，推出新的动画影片！
t_en: So, the proposal I'm making isn't an acquisition at all, but a partnership! Together we can be greater by producing a new animation flick!

t_ch: 不知道导演是否对合作拍摄感兴趣呢？
t_en: I wonder if you have any interest in a film collaboration?

t_ch: 说来听听。
t_en: I'm all ears.

t_ch: 态度转变真快…
t_en: That tone sure changed fast...

t_ch: 哈哈，相信导演你也明白——对我们来说，斗争，不如共赢。
t_en: Haha, as I'm sure you know, Director, a mutual victory is much more pragmatic than competition to us.

t_ch: 有钱赚吗？
t_en: Is there any money in it?

t_ch: 哈哈，互利共赢的事情，当然不会让导演这边亏损的。
t_en: Haha, as it is with such matters with mutual benefits, you will surely stand to gain as well.

t_ch: 鸢尾花家系拥有最优秀的导演与最专业的演员，我们可以提供所有的拍摄器械与工作人员。
t_en: The Iris Family has the best directors and most professional actors. We can provide all the film equipment and staff.

t_ch: 我们甚至还请来了特殊嘉宾，深藏在梦中的伟大之桶……
t_en: We've even invited a special guest — the majestic trashcan buried in the dream...

t_ch: 当然，合作需要双方共同参与。我们愿将{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}你列为这部影片的总监制，你可以随时在片场查看拍摄进程与内容。
t_en: Of course, a partnership requires that both parties participate. We're willing to bill you, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, as the executive producer. You can check in on the progress and content at the film set at any time.

t_ch: 无妨，您准备好再来找我。
t_en: That's fine. Come find me when you are.

t_ch: 这是用来拍摄<color=#dbc291ff>「外传故事」</color>的素材，您可以去找我们的动画师一同完成这部外传——这些痴迷于动画的艺术家都戴着角色的头套，您应该一眼就能认得出来。
t_en: This is the material used to shoot <color=#dbc291ff>Extra Stories</color>. You can find animators to complete this extra story. Those animation-obsessed artists are all wearing various characters as headwear. You should be able to identify them immediately.

t_ch: 为角色拍摄外传是克劳克影业传承至今的光荣传统，那些未能在正片中得到充分塑造的角色将在外传中散发他们独特的光彩，吸引更多的人气。
t_en: Filming extra stories for characters is a glorious tradition that Clock Studios has continued to the very present. The characters who didn't get to be fully shaped in the main flick can showcase their uniqueness in extra stories and gain more popularity.

t_ch: 您现在有空吗？让我来给您讲解一下吧。
t_en: Do you have time now? Let me explain the details.

t_ch: 您讲吧。
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 导演，汽水先生的外传已经制作完成了？听说外传十分精彩，那位动画师对你的水平赞不绝口！
t_en: Director, have you already finished making Mr. Soda's extra story? I heard that the Extra you shot was all kinds of thrilling. The animator can't stop praising your skill!

t_ch: 您可以去找我们的动画师一同完成这部外传——这些痴迷于动画的艺术家都戴着角色的头套，您应该一眼就能认得出来。
t_en: You can find animators to complete this extra story. Those animation-obsessed artists are all wearing various characters as headwear. You should be able to identify them immediately.

t_ch: 拍摄外传的任务就拜托您了！在您的导演下，我们的角色一定会成为留名影史的经典人物！
t_en: I'm counting on you to shoot the Extra! Under your directions, our characters will definitely be classics that echo down the annals of cinema!

t_ch: 导演，哈努兄弟的外传已经制作完成了？听说你们制作的外传从各个角度挖掘了哈努兄弟的过去，那位哈努动画师对你的叙事水平赞不绝口！
t_en: Director, have you already finished making Brother Hanu's extra story? I heard that the Extra you shot explored Hanu's past from all kinds of angles. The animator for Brother Hanu's can't stop praising your narrative skills!

t_ch: 那位哈努动画师平时可是出了名的傲慢，麻烦你帮他出谋划策，还真不好意思……
t_en: The animator is usually known for his arrogance, so we're going to need you to help him come up with some ideas. We're really sorry about this...

t_ch: 没关系。
t_en: That's alright.

t_ch: 哎呀，导演的心胸真是宽广。
t_en: Ah, the director sure is considerate.

t_ch: 报酬呢？
t_en: What about the reward?

t_ch: 呃…您应该在指导他的过程中也有所收获吧？
t_en: Uh... I'm sure you've gained some knowledge during the directing process, right?

t_ch: 那你意思意思。
t_en: Then show me a token of your appreciation.

t_ch: 咳咳，最近剧组手头紧呀，请多见谅。
t_en: *cough* So, like, the production team's been a bit stretched on the budget side of things recently. We hope you understand.

t_ch: 接下来的重头工作还是正片剪辑，影城的修复资金、克劳克影业的命运、「钟表匠」先生的期望，还有钟表小子的未来…这些就都交给您了，导演！
t_en: The repeating that's to follow is still editing the movie. The refurbishment fund of the theme park, the fate of Clock Studios, Mr. Watchmaker's expectation, and the future of Clockie... They are all in your hands, director!

t_ch: 快看，天上奇怪的痕迹消失了！
t_en: Look. The strange markings in the sky have disappeared!

t_ch: 天呐，一定是那位新导演的功劳……
t_en: My word, that must be the work of the new director...

t_ch: 导演，有空来执导他们提案的<color=#dbc291ff>广告短片</color>吗？如果是您出手的话，肯定能创作出精彩绝伦的广告片！
t_en: Director, do you have time to direct the <color=#dbc291ff>commercial</color> they mentioned? If it's done by you, the commercial will definitely be an epic one!

t_ch: 去拍广告片。
t_en: Go shoot the Commercial.

t_ch: 好嘞，我去通知广告商。
t_en: Alright, I'll let the advertisers know.

t_ch: 有了更丰富的资金之后，影片的拍摄也会更加顺利，您能够调用的资源也会增多——
t_en: With more funding, the filming process will also go smoother, and the resources available to you will increase...

t_ch: 拍摄广告的重任就拜托您了！
t_en: The task of shooting the commercial is now in your hands!

t_ch: 先继续剪辑
t_en: Continue editing

t_ch: 先去拍广告。
t_en: Shoot the Commercial first.

t_ch: 这份重任就拜托您了！
t_en: This task will be up to you!

t_ch: 您回来了，拍广告的感觉怎么样？
t_en: You're back. How did it feel shooting the ad?

t_ch: 非常兴奋。
t_en: Pretty rad.

t_ch: 毕竟有许多动作元素，不过对您来说肯定是小菜一碟。
t_en: It did have lots of action-heavy elements, didn't it? Must've been no big deal to you though.

t_ch: 非常无聊。
t_en: Pretty boring.

t_ch: 与大片相比，广告只能算是开胃小菜。
t_en: Compared to a film, a commercial can only be considered an appetizer.

t_ch: 感觉很一般。
t_en: So-so.

t_ch: 哈哈，还是剪辑影片有趣！
t_en: Haha, editing a film is probably still more interesting!

t_ch: 许多观众对《美梦往事》翘首以盼，让我们继续剪辑的工作吧！
t_en: Many fans look forward to Dreamjoy Memoir. Let's keep up the editing!

t_ch: 开始剪辑。
t_en: Begin editing.

t_ch: 稍等，我休息一会。
t_en: Hold on, let me take a break.

t_ch: 好嘞，我就在这里等您。
t_en: Alright, I'll be here waiting.

t_ch: 诶？这个屏幕好像和之前不一样了……
t_en: Hm? This screen seems different from before...

t_ch: 听说最近《美梦往事》的影片很火，多亏了影片导演，让这里起死回生了。
t_en: I recently heard the Dreamjoy Memoir movie is super popular. The new director really breathed life back into this place.

t_ch: 急急急，我现在就要看到这位导演的下一部作品！
t_en: Let's go! I need to see what this director makes next!

t_ch: 诶，你快看，这儿的屏幕被修好了。居然可以凭一己之力扭转颓势，导演也太牛了吧！
t_en: Look, the screen here's been fixed. The director's turning things around on by their lonesome. Astonishing!

t_ch: 有点好奇导演是谁，不会是那位传说中的钟表匠吧！
t_en: I wonder who the director is. It's not the legendary Watchmaker, is it?

t_ch: 别急，听说这里马上就要举办《美梦往事》的展映活动了，说不定我们能一睹真容……
t_en: Don't rush. I heard there's going to be a Dreamjoy Memoir screening event, maybe we'll be able to see things for ourselves then...

t_ch: 没问题，交给我吧。
t_en: No problem, leave it to me.

t_ch: 您一定能拍出伟大的广告！
t_en: You can definitely produce a great advertisement!

t_ch: 您回来了，刚刚我接到鸢尾花家系工作人员的电话，他们对您在广告拍摄时展现出的专业水准赞不绝口，大家都非常期待成品的效果！
t_en: You're back. I just got a call from the Iris Family. They praised your professionalism while shooting the commercial to heaven and back. Everyone's looking forward to the results of your completed work!

t_ch: 小菜一碟。
t_en: Piece of cake.

t_ch: 哈哈，和大片相比，拍摄广告对您来说确实不算什么。
t_en: Haha, commercials must be nothing to you, compared to undertaking a film.

t_ch: 还要我干什么活？
t_en: What else do you need me for?

t_ch: 许多观众对《美梦往事》翘首以盼，让我们继续剪辑的工作吧！
t_en: Many fans look forward to Dreamjoy Memoir. Let's keep up the editing!

t_ch: 太感谢了！期待您的好消息！
t_en: Thanks a lot! Looking forward to hearing the good news!

t_ch: 开始最终的剪辑。
t_en: Begin the final edits.

t_ch: 等我一会儿。
t_en: Give me a moment.

t_ch: 嗯，那我先去帮动画师了。
t_en: Alright, I'll help out the animators first.

t_ch: 就连鸢尾花家系的「美梦剧团」都希望找我们合作。近期「惊梦剧团」制造的案件增多，他们想通过钟表小子的IP来挽救自己的形象。
t_en: Even Sweet Dreams Troupe from the Iris Family has contacted us for collaboration. The crimes committed by Dreamjolt Troupe are on the rise lately, so they want to salvage their reputation by associating themselves with the Clockie franchise.

t_ch: 加油，导演，拍摄广告的重任还在等着您去完成！既然您能拍好电影，也一定能拍出伟大的广告！
t_en: Good luck, director. The grave responsibility of completing the commercial awaits! If you can make a fantastic film, then you definitely can make a grand commercial!

t_ch: 我去找下家族吧。
t_en: Let me go find a member of The Family.

t_ch: （广告拍摄顺利结束，该回去找皮斯继续<color=#f29e38ff>剪辑影片</color>了……）
t_en: (The commercial shoot has ended swimmingly. Time to find Pisce and continue <color=#f29e38ff>editing the film</color>...)

t_ch: （外传的制作告一段落，该回去继续剪辑《美梦往事》了……）
t_en: (The Extra's commercial is done. Time to continue editing Dreamjoy Memoir...)

t_ch: 咕噜噜…汽水先生的外传，这玩意儿到底该怎么做呢……
t_en: *gurgle* Mr. Soda's extra story... What am I gonna do about that one...

t_ch: 这个瓶子脑袋似乎正在为什么事情苦恼，找点能让他打起精神的消息吧。
t_en: This bottle brain seems to be troubled by something. Find something to help lift up his spirits.

t_ch: 咕噜噜…汽水先生的外传，这玩意儿到底该怎么做呢……
t_en: *gurgle* Mr. Soda's extra story... What am I gonna do about that one...

t_ch: 《汽水先生》外传的广告上映了。
t_en: The Mr. Soda extra story's commercial has aired.

t_ch: 噗！什么？怎么这么快？！
t_en: Pfft... What!? That was fast!

t_ch: 咕噜噜…我现在就像没盖子的苏乐达——气儿都泄光了，啥点子都想不出来。
t_en: *gurgle* I feel like a bottle of SoulGlad that someone left the cap off... all out of fizz, with no more ideas bubbling up.

t_ch: 汽水先生是苏乐达企业跟克劳克影业的联动角色，据说原型是苏乐达的创始人「苏萨先生」。
t_en: The Mr. Soda character is a co-production between SoulGlad Enterprise and Clock Studios. They say the model for the prototype was based on the drink's creator, Mr. Sousa.

t_ch: 如果按苏乐达广告里的说法，他曾是一个信奉同谐的伟大厨师，善良、无私、和蔼、彬彬有礼……
t_en: Based on SoulGlad's ads, he was this incredible cook who believed deeply in Harmony. He was kind, selfless, affable, courteous...

t_ch: 不过「钟表匠」先生似乎对这个说法不怎么满意，他笔下的汽水先生跟传说里温文尔雅的圣人完全不同，是一个常常出丑的傻瓶子。
t_en: But Mr. Watchmaker didn't seem very happy with that version. His character Mr. Soda is nothing like the graceful saint of legend but instead is this buffoon bottle always acting the fool.

t_ch: 是「钟表匠」的恶作剧？
t_en: Is this some kind of prank from the Watchmaker?

t_ch: 咕噜噜，也许是。那位董事长一直与家族不合，肯定看不惯这种被同谐信仰包装出来的大英雄。
t_en: *gurgle* Maybe. That chairman has always been at odds with The Family. I bet he won't like a great hero packaged up by the Harmony faith.

t_ch: 是艺术加工？
t_en: Is that called artistic license?

t_ch: 咕噜噜，也许是。一个满嘴同谐的圣人太无聊了，愚蠢又可爱的汽水先生肯定更讨人喜欢。
t_en: *gurgle* Maybe. A self-righteous saint harping on about Harmony is boring, so a loveable buffoon like Mr. Soda is going to appeal more widely.

t_ch: 或许这才是真正的他。
t_en: Perhaps that's his real self.

t_ch: 咕噜噜，我听说钟表小子中的角色都是「钟表匠」先生的故人…说不定董事长认识的苏萨先生就是这样的人吧。
t_en: *gurgle* I heard the characters in Clockie are all Mr. Watchmaker's old friends... Maybe the Mr. Sousa known to the chairman was just one such person.

t_ch: 无论如何，我都没法把伟大的苏萨先生和滑稽的汽水先生结合在一起…导演，我知道你了解「钟表匠」，那就麻烦你和我一起构思这份剧本吧！
t_en: No matter how I look at it, I can't integrate the magnificent Mr. Sousa with the rubberface antics of Mr. Soda... Director, you know the Watchmaker, so can you please help me put together this part of the script?

t_ch: 没问题！
t_en: No problem!

t_ch: 咕噜噜，谢谢你，这下外传的故事就有着落了！
t_en: *gurgle* Thank you, this extra story finally has some legs!

t_ch: 自己干。
t_en: Do it yourself.

t_ch: 咕噜噜，别这么说呀，我真想不出方案了，再这样下去就要开天窗了！
t_en: *gurgle* Don't be like that. I really can't think of anything. Don't make me leave it blank!

t_ch: 又要打白工？
t_en: Am I doing more unpaid overtime?

t_ch: 咕噜噜，别这么说呀，您一定能从中学习到新的「导演技巧」！
t_en: *gurgle* Don't be like that. You'll definitely learn plenty of Directorial Skills from this!

t_ch: 来，让我们开始创作吧——
t_en: Come on, let's get creative in here...

t_ch: 「观众朋友们，汽水先生的故事要从钟表小子造访之前讲起。那时的美梦小镇还被称为『噩梦小镇』，镇民们被石头老板所奴役，而汽水先生是这里的……」
t_en: "Ladies and gents, Mr. Soda's story starts before Clockie arrived. Back then, Dreamville was still known as 'Nightmareville,' and Boss Stone ruled the townsfolk with an iron fist. Here we find Mr. Soda, who was a local..."

t_ch: 一个厨师。
t_en: Chef.

t_ch: 哦！这个说法和历史记录一样，很不错。
t_en: Oh! That's great, and historically accurate too.

t_ch: 青春偶像。
t_en: Youthful idol.

t_ch: 这个好玩，但一个长着小胡子冒气泡的瓶子真的能当偶像吗……
t_en: This is fun, but can a bottle with a mustache that blows bubbles really be an idol...

t_ch: 人造兵器「苏乐达•猎梦者X」。
t_en: Artificial weapon, "SoulGlad: Dreamhunter X."

t_ch: 嗯？似乎没听说过这种说法…但感觉还挺酷的，年轻人肯定喜欢！
t_en: Hmm? Never heard of that before... but it sounds pretty cool. The kids are gonna love it!

t_ch: 好，那就让我们继续吧——「汽水先生是这里的{TEXTJOIN#88}，和其他镇民一样，为石头老板没日没夜地打工。」
t_en: Ok, let's keep going... "Mr. Soda was the local {TEXTJOIN#88}, and worked tirelessly for Boss Stone night and day just like all the other townsfolk."

t_ch: 「石头老板每天都让镇民们去挖石头，却只给他们喝鳄鱼池里的脏水，吃沼泽地里的杂草，弄得大家苦不堪言。」
t_en: "Boss Stone commanded the townsfolk to dig up stones every day, but he only offered them swamp weed and soiled water from the crocodile lagoon as food and drink. Everyone was miserable from it."

t_ch: 「于是，汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了……」
t_en: "And so, Mr. Soda began to brew up a mysterious beverage. All of this was to..."

t_ch: 用甜美抚平镇民的痛苦。
t_en: Soothe the people's pain with sweetness.

t_ch: 哦？这个说法听起来很像苏乐达企业讲的故事，赞助商一定会高兴的。
t_en: Oh? That sounds like the kind of story SoulGlad Enterprise would tell. The sponsors will be happy.

t_ch: 赚一笔大钱。
t_en: Make a huge sum of money.

t_ch: 哈哈，这个和「钟表匠」先生笔下的汽水先生一样，吝啬又贪心。
t_en: Haha, that's just like Mr. Watchmaker's portrayal of Mr. Soda — cheap and greedy.

t_ch: 用汽水控制镇民的心智。
t_en: Use the soda to control the minds of the people.

t_ch: 有意思，但这听上去跟钟表小子的故事风格不太一样……
t_en: It's interesting, but it doesn't exactly give me the vibe of a Clockie story...

t_ch: 那我继续往下讲——「汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了{TEXTJOIN#89}。」
t_en: Let's keep going then: "Mr. Soda began to brew up a mysterious beverage. All of this was to {TEXTJOIN#89}."

t_ch: 「但他的行为却触怒了石头老板，他可不允许有人在自己的地盘上肆意妄为。卑鄙无耻的石头老板利用诡计捉住了汽水先生，把他丢进了大牢。」
t_en: "But his behavior angered Boss Stone, who would not allow anyone to transgress on his turf. The vile Boss Stone used a trick to capture Mr. Soda, and tossed him into a prison cell."

t_ch: 「但汽水先生福大命大，进了监狱没多久，就遇上了一个得救的机会——哈努兄弟与他的帮派掀起了动乱，载着钟表小子的『罗盘号』也来到了小镇中。」
t_en: "However, Mr. Soda had a stroke of great fortune. He was met with an opportunity for freedom not long after being imprisoned — Brother Hanu and his gang had caused a riot and the Compass, which was carrying Clockie on it, had just arrived in town."

t_ch: 「哈努兄弟和钟表小子特别喜欢汽水先生制造的饮料，他们与汽水先生成了伙伴，一起对抗石头老板。」
t_en: "Brother Hanu and Clockie loved Mr. Soda's drink, and they teamed up with him to fight together against Boss Stone."

t_ch: 「最后，石头老板被赶跑了，美梦小镇恢复了和平，汽水先生则……」
t_en: "In the end, Boss Stone was driven off and peace was restored to Dreamville, and Mr. Soda..."

t_ch: 开设了汽水工厂。
t_en: Established a soda factory.

t_ch: 嗯，这就是钟表小子动画里的情况，汽水先生开了个汽水厂，给美梦小镇的居民们继续提供美味——这就是苏乐达。
t_en: Yeah, well, that's what happened in the Clockie cartoon: Mr. Soda opens up a soda factory and keeps delivering great flavors for the townsfolk of Dreamville — a little something called SoulGlad.

t_ch: 在战场上牺牲了。
t_en: Perished on the battlefield.

t_ch: 天啊，苏萨先生确实死在了战场上，但这种情节放在动画里还是有点残酷…算了，现在的观众就好这口。
t_en: Wowsers, Mr. Sousa may have indeed died on the battlefield, but that detail's still a little cruel for an animation... Whatever. Audiences today adore that.

t_ch: 成了新的石头老板。
t_en: Became the new Boss Stone.

t_ch: 这真是个大胆的设想，不过还挺有教育意义的，屠龙者终成恶龙……
t_en: It's a bold idea, but one with a nice moral lesson inside it: The dragonslayer becomes the dragon...

t_ch: 好了，我们的外传剧本创作完成了！
t_en: Great, we're done with the extra story's script then!

t_ch: 「汽水先生的故事要从钟表小子造访之前讲起。那时的美梦小镇还被称为『噩梦小镇』，镇民们被石头老板所奴役，而汽水先生是这里的{TEXTJOIN#88}。」
t_en: "Mr. Soda's story starts before Clockie arrived. Back then, Dreamville was still known as 'Nightmareville,' and Boss Stone ruled the townsfolk with an iron fist. Here we find Mr. Soda, who was a local {TEXTJOIN#88}."

t_ch: 「石头老板每天都让镇民们去挖石头，却只给他们喝鳄鱼池里的脏水，吃沼泽地里的杂草，弄得大家苦不堪言。」
t_en: "Boss Stone commanded the townsfolk to dig up stones every day, but he only offered them swamp weed and soiled water from the crocodile lagoon as food and drink. Everyone was miserable from it."

t_ch: 「于是，汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了{TEXTJOIN#89}。」
t_en: "And so, Mr. Soda began to brew up a mysterious beverage. All of this was to {TEXTJOIN#89}."

t_ch: 「但他的行为却触怒了石头老板，他可不允许有人在自己的地盘上肆意妄为。卑鄙无耻的石头老板利用诡计捉住了汽水先生，把他丢进了大牢。」
t_en: "But his behavior angered Boss Stone, who would not allow anyone to transgress on his turf. The vile Boss Stone used a trick to capture Mr. Soda, and tossed him into a prison cell."

t_ch: 「但汽水先生被哈努兄弟和钟表小子救了出来，成为了他们的伙伴，一起对抗石头老板。」
t_en: "But Mr. Soda was saved by Brother Hanu and Clockie, who teamed up with him to fight together against Boss Stone."
